Yandex Disk for what matters most

Keep your files safe in the cloud, always at your fingertips.

Get started
Save

Yandex Disk will keep all your memories

With unlimited photo and video auto-upload, you'll never have to choose between keeping what matters and freeing up space.
Rediscover

Best moments, always near

Show your family photos on your phone, even if you uploaded them from your computer. You can access Yandex Disk from any device you like.
Don't sacrifice quality

Upload even large files

Save photos, videos, and designs up to 50 GB in size and work with them in their original quality.
Choose your plan

Space for everyone

For family or SMM professionals: store 250,000 photos or 500 hours of HD video

More ways to store and manage your files

Unlimited space for phone photos and videos
Access your files from any device

Use together with other Yandex 360 services

Save attachments from Yandex Mail
Plane tickets, online shopping receipts — you won't lose anything.

Create, edit, and view presentations, documents, and spreadsheets.

macOS

iOS

FAQ

How do I log in to Yandex Disk?
You can access your Yandex Disk from any device with an internet connection. To do this, go to disk.yandex.ru, enter your username and password, then press "Log in". If you want to go to Yandex Disk from this site, click the profile icon in the top right corner, log in to your Yandex account, and select Disk. Learn more in Help.
How do I upload files to Yandex Disk?
To upload your files, open Yandex Disk on the device where they're saved and choose what you want to upload. Learn more in Help.
What are the Yandex Disk plans?
Yandex Disk doesn't have its own plans. Yandex 360 plans already include all premium features of Yandex Disk, Yandex Mail, Yandex Telemost, and more. You can choose a Yandex 360 plan based on how much space you need: 200 GB, 1 TB, or 3 TB.
How do I access my files from different devices?
Log in to your Yandex account and access Yandex Disk on any device: computer, tablet, smartphone, in your browser, or through the app. Changes to files on Yandex Disk are synced between all your devices.
How much space do I get for free?
When you sign up for Yandex Disk, you get 5 GB for free. Subscribe to a Yandex 360 plan to get 200 GB, 1 TB, or 3 TB of additional space on Yandex Disk.
How do I transfer my files to Yandex Disk?
Back up all your phone photos and videos to Yandex Disk. Subscribe to any Yandex 360 plan, then enable auto-upload and the "Upload to unlimited storage" option. Find out more in Help. To manually transfer your files, open Yandex Disk on the device where they're saved and pick what you want to move. Want to move files from another cloud storage? Download them to your computer and upload them with the Yandex Disk desktop app or through your browser.
How do I pay for my Yandex 360 plan?
You can pay for your plan on our website from your computer or phone. Select a plan, press "Activate", then enter the card details and press "Pay". Learn more about how to activate a plan in Help.
